action_set_definitions.name: get_reactor_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time state of the batch reactor, including temperatures, concentrations, and system status.

action_set_definitions.name: set_jacket_temperature
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the temperature of the cooling/heating jacket fluid. Use this to control the internal reactor temperature through heat exchange.

target_temp_k.description: The target temperature for the jacket fluid in Kelvin.

action_set_definitions.name: set_agitator_speed
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the speed of the internal mixer. Higher speeds are required during the high-viscosity Gel Effect phase to ensure thermal homogeneity.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_process_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the process simulation by a specified time step, allowing the reaction to proceed and the state to evolve based on the current control parameters.

duration_min.description: The number of minutes to advance the process.

state_description.internal_temp_k: Current temperature of the reactant mixture in Kelvin.
state_description.pressure_kpa: Internal pressure of the reactor vessel in kiloPascals.
state_description.liquid_volume_l: Volume of the liquid currently in the reactor in Liters.
state_description.reactant_a_conc: Concentration of Reactant A in mol/L.
state_description.product_c_conc: Concentration of the target Product C in mol/L.
state_description.jacket_temp_k: Temperature of the cooling/heating jacket fluid in Kelvin.
state_description.elapsed_time_min: Total time elapsed since the start of the batch process in minutes.
